revision.comment: Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] (no interwikis found)
Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Bot: wrap 4 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23176857634|manual triggered pipeline]]

[[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Compare_image_with_Wikidata%2Fdoc here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text: {{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{Tracks Wikidata|P18}} '''{{NAMESPACE}}:{{BASEPAGENAME}}''' may be added to an [[Help:Infobox|infobox]] template which displays an image. In any article using the infobox with an image, it adds either {{cl|Articles having same image on Wikidata and Wikipedia}} or {{cl|Articles having different image on Wikidata and Wikipedia}}. In any article using the infobox without an image, it adds {{cl|No local image but image on Wikidata}} (also used by [[Template:Wikidata image]]). == Usage == Add the following to a template (if necessary, change "image" to whatever parameter name that template uses to display an image): : {{compare|local={{{image|}}}}} == Tracking categories == * {{Category link with count|Articles having same image on Wikidata and Wikipedia}} * {{Category link with count|Articles having different image on Wikidata and Wikipedia}} * {{Category link with count|No local image but image on Wikidata}} == Infoboxes using this template == * {{tl|Infobox aviator}} * {{tl|Infobox beauty pageant}} * {{tl|Infobox deity}} * {{tl|Infobox religious biography}} * {{tl|Infobox spy}} == See also == * {{tl|Wikidata image}} {{sandbox other|| }} [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:templates missing wikidata]] [[Category:Wikidata templates]] [[Category:Graphics templates]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] [[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
